title: Amendments to KYC and Cybersecurity Guidelines

chunks.text: Banks downloading valid CIF profiles from the Central KYC Registry (CKYCR) are exempt from physical re-verification. Re-verification is not mandatory for these downloaded CKYC profiles, provided there is no mismatch in customer data.

All customer personal data and transaction data must be encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 or higher protocols, and at rest using AES-256 or higher encryption algorithms. Encryption keys must be rotated at least once every 6 months to prevent unauthorized disclosure.
